title: MonetDB Round Function issues in the latest release
description:
- When using round function inside case statement, an error of division by zero occurs

**To Reproduce**
poc:
Create Table 
        create table round_test(
            category String null,
            colorby String null,
            stddev_dep_delay double null,
            usl double null,
            lsl double null
        );

select a.*,
                case when stddev_dep_delay is null or stddev_dep_delay=0 
                    then -9999 
                else round(((usl - lsl) / (6 * stddev_dep_delay)), 3) end as pp_dep_delay
            from round_test a;

select a.*,
            case when stddev_dep_delay is null or stddev_dep_delay=0 
                then -9999 
            else 
                --round( 
                    ((usl - lsl) / (6 * stddev_dep_delay)) 
                --   , 3)
                end as pp_dep_delay
        from round_test a;

select a.*, round( 
            case when stddev_dep_delay is null or stddev_dep_delay=0 
                then -9999 
            else ((usl - lsl) / (6 * stddev_dep_delay)) end , 3) as pp_dep_delay
        from round_test a;
key_bug_features: Round function inside case statement causes division by zero
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE round_test_extended(category STRING NULL, colorby STRING NULL, stddev_dep_delay DOUBLE NULL, usl DOUBLE NULL, lsl DOUBLE NULL, additional_info STRING NULL);
SELECT a.*, CASE WHEN stddev_dep_delay IS NULL OR stddev_dep_delay = 0 THEN -9999 ELSE ROUND(((usl - lsl) / (6 * stddev_dep_delay)), 3) END AS pp_dep_delay FROM round_test_extended a;

SELECT a.*, ROUND(CASE WHEN stddev_dep_delay IS NULL OR stddev_dep_delay = 0 THEN -9999 ELSE ((usl - lsl) / (6 * stddev_dep_delay)) END, 3) AS pp_dep_delay FROM round_test_extended a WHERE colorby IS NOT NULL;
